creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #1)
> There's a good chance that the MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE has been fixed.  I know it's
> been fixed on trunk.

Hm, I've tried the port as of r425457 (so your last commit to it) with MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE removed, but I can't get the build to fail. I even tried MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=16. :)

What would be needed to reproduce the failure?  (Note that I uninstalled the installed zstd package, so it definitely couldn't pick up stuff in /usr/local/lib by accident.)
